brand_vibe: Warm, cozy, trustworthy, non-clinical, hand-crafted feel. A beloved neighborhood pet home.

components.button_primary: bg-[#1B7B8A] text-white hover:bg-[#15636F] transition-all rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
components.button_secondary: bg-[#E8821A] text-white hover:bg-[#C96E14] transition-all rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
components.card: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E0E0D0] rounded-[24px] p-6 hover:shadow-[0_16px_40px_rgba(27,123,138,0.12)] transition-all duration-300
components.trust_badge: flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#E9F2F0] text-[#1B7B8A] px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold
components.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50
components.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-[#E0E0D0] p-4 flex gap-4 z-40 md:hidden

motion.page_load: framer-motion initial opacity-0 translate-y-4 animate to opacity-100 translate-y-0 stagger 0.1s

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind for marketing pages; use Shadcn strictly for dashboard and booking flows.
Implement mobile-first design with the bottom sticky bar for booking/WhatsApp on screens < 768px.
Do NOT use standard default Shadcn cards for marketing. Use the highly rounded, soft-shadow card design specified.
Inject the Nunito font for all headings to establish a friendly, approachable brand identity.
Ensure the layout feels asymmetrical and organic, avoiding clinical, perfectly rigid grid walls where possible.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
